base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lunar_lair — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. Lunar Lair — Zemus's resting place, final-boss antechamber. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Lunar Lair — Zemus's resting place, final-boss antechamber
